tasks.label: Run City League E2E (Auto Server)
args: $serverUp = $false; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; $serverUp = $true } catch { $serverUp = $false }; if (-not $serverUp) { Start-Process -FilePath '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8000' -WorkingDirectory '.' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; & '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -u 'tests/e2e_city_league_meta.py'

tasks.label: Run Current Meta E2E (Auto Server)
args: $serverUp = $false; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; $serverUp = $true } catch { $serverUp = $false }; if (-not $serverUp) { Start-Process -FilePath '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8000' -WorkingDirectory '.' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; & '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -u 'tests/e2e_current_meta_global.py'

tasks.label: Run Past Meta E2E (Auto Server)
args: $serverUp = $false; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; $serverUp = $true } catch { $serverUp = $false }; if (-not $serverUp) { Start-Process -FilePath '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8000' -WorkingDirectory '.' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; & '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -u 'tests/e2e_past_meta.py'
